Localization.Description: Possible forced user authentication using .scf or .url files. Such authentication allows attackers to obtain NTLM password hashes of users who open a network share with these files using Windows Explorer. Attackers can then use these hashes for attacks such as Pass-the-Hash, or to bruteforce passwords in clear text and use them to gain access to other systems.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} was redirected for forced authentication to host {dst.host} after opening a network share with file "{object.storage.name}" on host {datafield5}
Possible forced authentication of user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} after opening a network share with file "{object.storage.name}" on host {event_src.host}
